---
title: '07/24/14 - EOD Journal - Sick, Tired, Or HEALED?!'
date: '2014-07-25T02:42:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: '(My Journal) Fed By Faith'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1846875142008153583'
blogger_filename: '/2014/07/072414-eod-journal-sick-tired-or-healed.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/(My Journal) Fed By Faith/feed.atom'
---

Felt ill all of yesterday, attacked by the Devil. Realized today that I wasn't in Faith. I mentioned to Christian that I felt cold all day, and he replied "Uh Oh, maybe you are getting sick." I didn't accept that, but, I did say "No, I'm not sick, it may be the off sleep schedule." So Jesus revealed to me that the devil couldn't get me to accept sickness, but could get me to accept physical symptoms related to sleep.<br />
<br />
NO! In Jesus name I am whole!<br />
<br />
I accept my perfect peace, roll this care over on to Jesus. I receive my benefits, and among those is Healing!<br />
<br />
Darrell G. Wolfe 07/24/14 9:41 PM CT
